message:
✨ CSS scale tiles to preserve terminal content without resize (#149)

- Use CSS transform:scale() instead of fitAddon.fit() for tile mode
- Freezes each .xterm element at its full-viewport natural size, then
  scales down visually to fit tile cells
- suppressPtyResize prevents remote app from clearing/redrawing
- Preserves alternate screen buffer content (Claude Code TUI output)
- All terminals maintain full-viewport layout via visibility:hidden
  in single mode, enabling accurate size capture for scaling
- Wheel throttle only blocks rapid events, lets xterm handle scroll
- Verified via pixel analysis: top half of every tile has ≥5% bright
  pixels (content present, not just bottom prompt)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
